system.flavor: You lock eyes with a foe, letting them know the fate that will befall them if they come in your reach.
system.effect:
Mark your turn and mark a foe in range. While marked, that foe gains attack [-] against you and adjacent allies. If you start your turn adjacent to your marked foe, that foe must save. They take 1d6+4 damage, and half as much on a successful save. Then end the mark. The mark otherwise remains active.
Finishing Blow is also stunned on a failed save.
